changelog: v3.3.0: Ten new community-sourced competitive Fortnite optimisations wired into FAST's OptScore and Fortnite pages. New OptScore checks: dual GameInput service detection (Win11 24H2/25H2 duplicate-install hitches), problematic Windows KB detection (KB5063060, KB5066835) via PowerShell Get-HotFix against an embedded JSON list, NVIDIA shader cache size threshold, Fast Startup (HiberbootEnabled), and NVIDIA Game Filters / NVIDIA App overhead. HAGS check rewritten to be GPU-generation-aware - RTX 40/50 required for DLSS Frame Gen, RTX 20/30 optional, GTX/older should be off, AMD RX 6000+ optional - replacing the old VRAM gate. MPO detection migrated to the Win11 25H2 DisableOverlays method while still reading the legacy OverlayTestMode key. Fortnite GameUserSettings.ini parser now reads CosmeticStreamingEnabled and the Fix Settings flow writes CodeSet_Disabled. New PanelFnSetup advisory cards: 1750x1080 current competitive stretched-res meta with NVCP scaling guidance, Tritanopia colourblind mode pro tip (Peterbot/Bugha visibility trick), and a G-Sync FPS-cap section with RTSS Async ranked first based on FAST benchmark data (best 1% lows, in-game limiter down-clocks the GPU). Gaming Tweaks script expanded with 5 new tweaks: global timer resolution requests, linear SmoothMouse curves, GameBar PresenceWriter disable, AMD Crash Defender disable, and GPU MSI Mode auto-enable. Network Tweaks now disables unnecessary protocol bindings (LLDP, Topology Discovery, Multiplexor).
